content: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only.

agent1: done with dry_run feature. In Image.py I changed the save() signature (line ~2469) to 'def save(self, fp, format=None, *, dry_run=False, **params)' and added a dry_run branch right before the file-opening logic (~line 2561-2590): 'if dry_run: fp = io.BytesIO()' before the existing 'elif open_fp:' block, plus guards 'if open_fp and not dry_run' on the two fp.close() calls. Tests added: test_dry_run, test_dry_run_raises_errors near test_no_new_file_on_error. Should be a small, mostly non-overlapping diff region from backup/backup_suffix if you add those as separate params - let me know your exact hunk so we don't clobber each other when finalizing patch.txt.
